title: Tangy Jamaican Mixed Peel Chicken Salad
description: A light, flavorful salad featuring sauteed chicken tossed with mixed greens, citrus segments, and a zesty Jamaican-inspired vinaigrette.

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: 1 tbsp for sauté, 1 tbsp for dressing

instructions: Season the cubed chicken with sea salt, black pepper, and Jamaican jerk seasoning.
Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a skillet over medium‑high heat until shimmering.
Add the seasoned chicken and sauté for 7–8 minutes or until the internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C).
Remove the chicken and set aside to rest.
While the chicken cooks, wash and dry the mixed greens, segment the orange, and chop the cilantro.
In a small bowl, whisk together the lime juice, remaining 1 tbsp olive oil, sea salt, and black pepper to make the vinaigrette.
Toss the greens with the vinaigrette until evenly coated.
Add the cooked chicken, orange segments, and chopped cilantro to the salad.
Gently toss all ingredients together and serve immediately.
Optional: chill the salad for 10 minutes to let the flavors meld before serving.
